speaker: charlie
text: Now this next story is proper mind-blowing. Scientists in the UK have developed a blood test that can detect around 50 different types of cancer even before symptoms appear.

speaker: alice
text: It's incredible, isn't it? Just one simple blood test checking for DNA fragments that cancer cells release. Over 140,000 people took part in the trials, and if the results hold up, it could revolutionise early detection.

speaker: charlie
text: Plus we had the 2026 Breakthrough Prizes announced - the Oscars of science. Gene therapy researchers took home the big gongs for treatments that are literally giving sight to the blind and curing blood disorders.
